chapter_title.ar: بَابُ ذَمِّ الدُّنْيَا وَ الزُّهْدِ فِيهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 61 – Condemning the world and (adopting) the ascetism in it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (273/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (273/ 8)
text: مَا أَعْجَبَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) شَيْ‏ءٌ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا إِلَّا أَنْ يَكُونَ فِيهَا جَائِعاً خَائِفاً .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Yahya Al Khash’amy, from Talha Bin Zayd,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Nothing from the world astounded Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> except if there happened to be hunger and fear in it’.
en.sarwar: 7. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Yahya al-Khath’ami from Talha ibn Zayd from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Every one of things the Messenger of Allah liked from this world was associated with suffering, hunger or fear.’”
